title: Sum of Two Numbers
description: Given two integers a and b on the same line, print their sum.
inputFormat: Two space-separated integers a and b
solution:
a, b = map(int, input().split())
print(a + b)

title: Factorial
description: Given a non-negative integer n (0 ≤ n ≤ 10), print n! (n factorial).
solution:
n = int(input())
result = 1
for i in range(2, n + 1):
    result *= i
print(result)

title: Reverse a String
description: Given a single word (no spaces), print it reversed.

title: Find Maximum
description: Given n integers on a single line, print the largest one.
inputFormat: First line: integer n. Second line: n space-separated integers.
solution:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(max(arr))

title: Count Vowels
description: Count how many vowels (a, e, i, o, u) are in the given word. Lowercase only.
solution:
s = input()
count = sum(1 for c in s if c in 'aeiou')
print(count)

title: Palindrome Check
description: Check if a given single word is a palindrome. Print YES or NO.

title: FizzBuzz
description: For integers 1 to n, print Fizz (divisible by 3), Buzz (divisible by 5), FizzBuzz (both), or the number.

title: Array Sum
description: Calculate the sum of all elements in an array.
inputFormat: First line: integer n. Second line: n space-separated integers.
solution:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(sum(arr))

title: Even or Odd
description: Determine whether a given integer is even or odd.

title: String Length
description: Print the number of characters in the given word.
inputFormat: A single word (at least 1 character, no spaces)
